title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: - High: [auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L35) automatically runs `git push` after any successful `git commit`. That creates an implicit external publication path from a local commit and can push unfinished or secret-bearing changes without an explicit send step. - Medium: [fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L636) computes `reviewThreshold`, but the actual gates in [fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L555) and [fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L558) still hardcode `AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD` and `7`. Recipe-specific thresholds in [dev-recipes.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/rules/dev-recipes.json#L27) are therefore ignored. - Medium: The recipe system looks nonfunctional as shipped. [recipe-loader.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-loader.mjs#L13) and [recipe-classifier.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-classifier.mjs#L16) read `~/.claude/rules/dev-recipes.json`, but this diff only adds [assets/rules/dev-recipes.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/rules/dev-recipes.json#L1), and `classifyRecipe` is imported but never called in [fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L9). In practice, auto-classification never happens, and even explicit `--recipe` likely falls back unless some out-of-band install copies the file. - Medium: [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L336) removed the old CJK/Japanese-line skip from bash-fence parsing. Japanese explanatory lines can now fall through to binary extraction at [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L373), be marked `PHANTOM_CMD`, and incorrectly penalize otherwise valid Japanese skill docs.
